'''Powered battle armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armored]] suit that boosted the abilities of its wearer while offering good protection against most types of weapons. The micro-hydraulics of this type of powered armor provided the operator with both protection and strength enhancement. This type of armor was rarely seen outside of professional [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]' and [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]' use.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
